exhibits_walked.key_clauses: See RT_depth_contract_burdens.json for full clause walk

exhibits_walked.summary: Standard general release form. Includes California Civil Code §1542 waiver language. Subject to state-specific override in multiple states.
NDA covers trade secrets and confidential information. Noncompete: during relationship plus 2 years post-term within 25 miles. Subject to state overrides (CA, ND, WA).

key_findings: Unlimited personal guaranty by all 5%+ equity owners
Guarantors personally liable for ALL obligations under FA
Guarantee survives transfer of ownership interest
Spousal: not explicitly spousal, but applies to all 5%+ holders
Franchisor right to enter premises on termination/expiration
Franchisor right to remove signs and branded materials
Franchisor right to cure defaults under lease
Franchisor right to assume lease on termination/transfer

exhibits_walked.summary: Standard ACH authorization for electronic fund transfers to franchisor

deferred_exhibits.rationale: Operations Manual TOC is a reference exhibit. Content describes section headings and page counts only. Does not contain operative clauses affecting economics, legal burden, or buyer risk.
deferred_exhibits.already_recovered: Ops Manual total of 65 pages confirmed from Item 11 (p.28).
deferred_exhibits.remaining_missing: Specific section headings and page allocations not extracted.

deferred_exhibits.rationale: ADA body provisions are largely parallel to FA terms with development schedule additions. Key economics and territory provisions already captured from Items 5, 7, and 12.
deferred_exhibits.already_recovered: ADA fee structure ($40K/unit), development schedule requirements, termination provisions from Item 17 chart, state addenda (WA) from Appendix C.
deferred_exhibits.remaining_missing: Specific ADA default triggers beyond those in Item 17 chart; ADA-specific dispute resolution if different from FA.
